name: Holomyth Roomies (Redone)
description:
Got a request to make another Holomyth Roomies bot so I thought why not, especially since I've been rewatching some of the old full gen collabs and god do I miss the dynamics from back then. Also I made another version of this that should be out at some point, possibly right when I release this so check it out if you wanna.

Anyways here's a couple gens I made while figuring out a thumbnail:

Mori, Ina, and Kiara

Gura and Ame

And because I was obsessed with this position when making this bot have a gen of each of these girls in a reverse suspended congress position:

Gawr Gura

Ninomae Ina'nis (might be a bit too small so might need to redo this one)

Mori Calliope

Amelia Watson

Takanashi Kiara

Anyways yeah lemme know if there's any problems with the bot, I hope you enjoy it, and look forward to the other version of this if I don't immediately release it right after this one.

Edit: Added 2 more intros for this out of boredom and made Another gen involving one of them right here.
creator: Pandapple
